# Nifty Utilities

> Nifty Utilities provides free browser-based utilities for CSV and spreadsheet data, personal finance, documents, home and life decisions, business calculations, images, filenames, barcodes, and other everyday tasks.

The site is static and requires no account. Tool inputs are processed locally in the visitor's browser and are not sent to or stored by Nifty Utilities. Each tool has a permanent, crawlable URL and a concise explanation of its purpose.

## Main pages

- [All tools](https://niftyutilities.com/): Search and browse the complete tool directory.
- [About](https://niftyutilities.com/about.html): Site purpose and operating model.
- [Privacy](https://niftyutilities.com/privacy.html): Local-processing and no-data-storage policy.
- [Terms](https://niftyutilities.com/terms.html): Terms of use for the tools.
- [Contact](https://niftyutilities.com/contact.html): How to reach the site operator.

## Finance / CSV

Clean statements, inspect spending, and plan debt without uploading financial data.

- [Bank Statement Cleaner](https://niftyutilities.com/finance/bank-statement-cleaner.html): Standardize dates, amounts, descriptions, and blank rows in statement CSVs.
- [Recurring Subscription Finder](https://niftyutilities.com/finance/recurring-subscription-finder.html): Find merchants and charges that appear on a repeating schedule.
- [Merchant Name Normalizer](https://niftyutilities.com/finance/merchant-name-normalizer.html): Turn noisy transaction descriptions into consistent merchant names.
- [Personal Spending Categorizer](https://niftyutilities.com/finance/personal-spending-categorizer.html): Assign common spending categories using editable keyword rules.
- [Duplicate Transaction Finder](https://niftyutilities.com/finance/duplicate-transaction-finder.html): Flag transactions with matching dates, amounts, and descriptions.
- [CSV Bank Format Converter](https://niftyutilities.com/finance/csv-bank-format-converter.html): Map statement columns into a simple date, description, amount format.
- [Credit Card Statement Analyzer](https://niftyutilities.com/finance/credit-card-statement-analyzer.html): Summarize charges by category and merchant from a CSV statement.
- [Debt Snowball Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/finance/debt-snowball-calculator.html): Estimate a payoff schedule using smallest-balance-first payments.
- [Debt Avalanche Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/finance/debt-avalanche-calculator.html): Estimate a payoff schedule using highest-interest-first payments.
- [Net Worth Tracker](https://niftyutilities.com/finance/net-worth-tracker.html): Track assets and liabilities locally in this browser.

## Spreadsheet / Data

Repair, reshape, compare, and convert everyday data files.

- [Merge CSV Files](https://niftyutilities.com/spreadsheet/merge-csv-files.html): Combine multiple CSV files that share the same columns.
- [Split CSV Files](https://niftyutilities.com/spreadsheet/split-csv-files.html): Break a large CSV into smaller files by row count.
- [Remove Duplicate Rows](https://niftyutilities.com/spreadsheet/remove-duplicate-rows.html): Remove repeated rows using all columns or selected columns.
- [Compare Two CSVs](https://niftyutilities.com/spreadsheet/compare-two-csvs.html): Find rows that were added, removed, or kept between two files.
- [Excel to CSV Cleaner](https://niftyutilities.com/spreadsheet/excel-to-csv-cleaner.html): Convert an Excel sheet to clean CSV in your browser.
- [Column Mapper](https://niftyutilities.com/spreadsheet/column-mapper.html): Rename and reorder columns into a target schema.
- [CSV Formula Generator](https://niftyutilities.com/spreadsheet/csv-formula-generator.html): Build spreadsheet formulas from a plain-English recipe.
- [Spreadsheet Error Finder](https://niftyutilities.com/spreadsheet/spreadsheet-error-finder.html): Scan CSV data for blanks, inconsistent widths, and suspicious values.
- [Delimiter Converter](https://niftyutilities.com/spreadsheet/delimiter-converter.html): Convert comma, tab, semicolon, or pipe-delimited data.
- [JSON ↔ CSV Converter](https://niftyutilities.com/spreadsheet/json-csv-converter.html): Convert arrays of JSON objects to CSV and CSV back to JSON.

## Documents

Create practical records and printable forms from straightforward inputs.

- [Bill of Sale Generator](https://niftyutilities.com/documents/bill-of-sale-generator.html): Create a printable general-purpose bill of sale.
- [Rent Receipt Generator](https://niftyutilities.com/documents/rent-receipt-generator.html): Create a clean receipt for a rent payment.
- [Mileage Log Generator](https://niftyutilities.com/documents/mileage-log-generator.html): Build and export a mileage log for business trips.
- [Equipment Inventory Generator](https://niftyutilities.com/documents/equipment-inventory-generator.html): Record equipment, serial numbers, locations, and values.
- [Invoice Number Generator](https://niftyutilities.com/documents/invoice-number-generator.html): Generate sequential, dated, or random invoice numbers.
- [Business Asset Register](https://niftyutilities.com/documents/business-asset-register.html): Create a downloadable register of business assets.
- [Home Inventory Generator](https://niftyutilities.com/documents/home-inventory-generator.html): Catalog household belongings and estimated replacement values.
- [Estate Inventory Worksheet](https://niftyutilities.com/documents/estate-inventory-worksheet.html): Organize estate assets, debts, accounts, and notes.
- [Affidavit Generator](https://niftyutilities.com/documents/affidavit-generator.html): Draft a basic affidavit worksheet for review and notarization.
- [Printable Receipt Generator](https://niftyutilities.com/documents/printable-receipt-generator.html): Create a simple printable receipt for a payment or sale.

## Homeowner / Life

Estimate major ownership, housing, travel, and shared-living costs.

- [Rent vs Buy Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/rent-vs-buy-calculator.html): Compare estimated monthly and long-term renting and buying costs.
- [Lease vs Buy Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/lease-vs-buy-calculator.html): Compare the estimated net cost of leasing and buying a vehicle.
- [Real Cost of Owning a Pool](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/real-cost-of-owning-a-pool.html): Estimate annual pool chemicals, energy, service, and repair costs.
- [Real Cost of Owning a Boat](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/real-cost-of-owning-a-boat.html): Estimate financing, fuel, storage, insurance, and maintenance.
- [Real Cost of Owning an RV](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/real-cost-of-owning-an-rv.html): Estimate financing, campsites, fuel, storage, and maintenance.
- [Real Cost of Owning a Horse](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/real-cost-of-owning-a-horse.html): Estimate annual boarding, feed, farrier, vet, and training costs.
- [Real Cost of Owning a Dog](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/real-cost-of-owning-a-dog.html): Estimate annual food, vet, grooming, insurance, and boarding costs.
- [Real Cost of Owning a Cat](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/real-cost-of-owning-a-cat.html): Estimate annual food, litter, vet, and supply costs for a cat.
- [Real Cost of Owning a Hot Tub](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/real-cost-of-owning-a-hot-tub.html): Estimate annual energy, chemicals, water, and service costs.
- [Real Cost of Owning a Car](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/real-cost-of-owning-a-car.html): Estimate financing, fuel, insurance, maintenance, and registration costs.
- [Real Cost of Raising Backyard Chickens](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/real-cost-of-raising-backyard-chickens.html): Estimate annual feed, bedding, health, and coop costs for a flock.
- [Real Cost of Lawn Care](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/real-cost-of-lawn-care.html): Estimate annual mowing, fertilizer, irrigation, and equipment costs.
- [Real Cost of Owning a Septic System](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/real-cost-of-owning-a-septic-system.html): Estimate annual pumping, inspection, repair, and drainfield reserve costs.
- [Real Cost of Owning a Motorcycle](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/real-cost-of-owning-a-motorcycle.html): Estimate financing, fuel, insurance, tires, gear, and registration costs.
- [Solar Panel Payback Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/solar-panel-payback-calculator.html): Estimate net system cost after incentives, annual savings, and payback period.
- [Real Cost of Owning a Rental Property](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/real-cost-of-owning-a-rental-property.html): Estimate mortgage, operating costs, vacancy, and annual rental cash flow.
- [Real Cost of Owning an Electric Car](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/real-cost-of-owning-an-electric-car.html): Estimate financing, charging, insurance, tires, maintenance, and registration costs.
- [Real Cost of Owning a Jet Ski](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/real-cost-of-owning-a-jet-ski.html): Estimate annual storage, fuel, insurance, winterization, and registration costs.
- [Real Cost of Owning a Second Home](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/real-cost-of-owning-a-second-home.html): Estimate mortgage, property tax, insurance, utilities, upkeep, and travel costs.
- [Real Cost of Owning a Classic Car](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/real-cost-of-owning-a-classic-car.html): Estimate agreed-value insurance, storage, upkeep, and appreciation for a collector car.
- [Real Cost of Owning a Vacation Rental](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/real-cost-of-owning-a-vacation-rental.html): Estimate mortgage, operating costs, platform fees, and net short-term rental income.
- [Moving Cost Estimator](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/moving-cost-estimator.html): Estimate truck, movers, mileage, supplies, lodging, and other costs.
- [Roommate Expense Splitter](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/roommate-expense-splitter.html): Split shared expenses evenly or by custom percentages.
- [Home Maintenance Budget Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/home-maintenance-budget-calculator.html): Build an annual maintenance reserve from home value, age, and systems.
- [Property Tax Estimator](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/property-tax-estimator.html): Estimate annual and monthly property tax from assessed value and rate.
- [Property Tax Appeal Estimator](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/property-tax-appeal-estimator.html): Gauge appeal success odds and tax savings from your assessment, purchase price, and comparable homes.
- [Vacation Budget Planner](https://niftyutilities.com/homeowner/vacation-budget-planner.html): Plan transportation, lodging, food, activities, and contingency spending.

## Business

Model pricing, profitability, labor, sales, and customer economics.

- [Lead Value Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/business/lead-value-calculator.html): Estimate the expected revenue and profit value of each lead.
- [Customer Lifetime Value Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/business/customer-lifetime-value-calculator.html): Estimate customer value using revenue, margin, churn, and acquisition cost.
- [Cost of Missed Calls Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/business/cost-of-missed-calls-calculator.html): Estimate revenue lost when customer calls go unanswered.
- [Cost of Employee Turnover Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/business/cost-of-employee-turnover-calculator.html): Estimate recruiting, vacancy, training, and productivity costs.
- [Hourly Rate Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/business/hourly-rate-calculator.html): Turn income goals and business costs into a sustainable hourly rate.
- [Profit Margin Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/business/profit-margin-calculator.html): Calculate gross profit, margin, markup, and target sale price.
- [Break-Even Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/business/break-even-calculator.html): Find the units and revenue needed to cover fixed costs.
- [Job Cost Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/business/job-cost-calculator.html): Calculate labor, materials, overhead, markup, and job price.
- [Service Pricing Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/business/service-pricing-calculator.html): Price a service from time, costs, overhead, and desired margin.
- [Sales Commission Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/business/sales-commission-calculator.html): Calculate tiered or flat sales commissions.

## Government & Deadlines

Turn federal eligibility rules and user-verified filing periods into clear planning dates and checklists.

- [Social Security Claiming Age Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/government/social-security-claiming-age-calculator.html): Compare a planned claiming age with full retirement age and estimate the monthly adjustment.
- [Required Minimum Distribution Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/government/rmd-calculator.html): Estimate an owner RMD using the IRS Uniform Lifetime Table and a prior year-end balance.
- [Tax Refund Timing Estimator](https://niftyutilities.com/government/tax-refund-timing-estimator.html): Build a typical federal refund processing window from the return type and accepted date.
- [FMLA Eligibility Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/government/fmla-eligibility-calculator.html): Screen the four basic federal employee-eligibility requirements for FMLA leave.
- [Naturalization Residency Date Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/government/naturalization-residency-date-calculator.html): Estimate the 90-day early-filing date and screen residence and physical-presence inputs.
- [I-94 Admit Until Date Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/government/i94-overstay-date-calculator.html): Compare a planned departure or current date with a date-certain I-94 admission record.
- [Small Claims Deadline Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/government/small-claims-deadline-calculator.html): Apply a locally verified limitation period and personal safety margin to a claim date.

## Weirdly Useful

Small browser utilities for images, filenames, codes, and awkward one-off jobs.

- [Screenshot Measurement Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/useful/screenshot-measurement-calculator.html): Draw on a photo, set one known length, and estimate wall lengths, dimensions, and floor area.
- [Receipt Scanner & Warranty Tracker](https://niftyutilities.com/useful/receipt-warranty-tracker.html): Scan a receipt, capture the purchase, and create a warranty expiration reminder for your calendar.
- [Screenshot to CSV](https://niftyutilities.com/useful/screenshot-to-csv.html): Extract text from a screenshot and arrange detected lines as CSV.
- [Screenshot Table Extractor](https://niftyutilities.com/useful/screenshot-table-extractor.html): Use in-browser OCR to turn a table image into editable rows.
- [Image Dimensions Inspector](https://niftyutilities.com/useful/image-dimensions-inspector.html): Inspect pixel size, aspect ratio, file type, and file size.
- [Bulk File Renamer](https://niftyutilities.com/useful/bulk-file-renamer.html): Preview cleaned, numbered filenames and download renamed copies.
- [Filename Cleaner](https://niftyutilities.com/useful/filename-cleaner.html): Remove clutter, normalize spacing, and standardize filename casing.
- [Duplicate Photo Detector](https://niftyutilities.com/useful/duplicate-photo-detector.html): Find exact duplicate images using local file hashes.
- [QR Batch Generator](https://niftyutilities.com/useful/qr-batch-generator.html): Generate multiple downloadable QR codes from lines of text.
- [Barcode Generator](https://niftyutilities.com/useful/barcode-generator.html): Generate a printable CODE128 barcode in the browser.
- [UPC Validator](https://niftyutilities.com/useful/upc-validator.html): Validate UPC-A check digits or calculate a missing check digit.
- [VIN Decoder](https://niftyutilities.com/useful/vin-decoder.html): Validate a VIN and decode its year and basic structure locally.

## Quizzes & Tests

Free self-assessments, skill tests, and just-for-fun quizzes with instant results: an original reasoning (IQ-style) test, typing and reaction speed tests, a memory test, a personality profiler, a color-blindness screening, and more. No sign-up, no email, nothing stored.

- [IQ Test](https://niftyutilities.com/quizzes/iq-test.html): Estimate your reasoning ability with an original, timed test spanning pattern, number, verbal, and spatial puzzles.
- [Typing Speed Test](https://niftyutilities.com/quizzes/typing-speed-test.html): Type a passage and measure your live WPM and accuracy in 15, 30, or 60 second modes — nothing saved.
- [Reaction Time Test](https://niftyutilities.com/quizzes/reaction-time-test.html): Click the moment the pad turns green across five rounds to measure your average reaction time in milliseconds.
- [Click Speed Test](https://niftyutilities.com/quizzes/click-speed-test.html): Click a pad as fast as you can in 5, 10, or 30 seconds to find your clicks-per-second (CPS) score.
- [Memory Test](https://niftyutilities.com/quizzes/memory-test.html): See how many digits your working memory can hold with a progressive digit-span recall test.
- [Color Blindness Test](https://niftyutilities.com/quizzes/color-blindness-test.html): Take a free at-home Ishihara-style red-green color-vision screening with plates drawn fresh in your browser.
- [Love Calculator](https://niftyutilities.com/quizzes/love-calculator.html): Enter two names for an instant, just-for-fun compatibility score — the same pair always gives the same result.
- [Personality Type Test](https://niftyutilities.com/quizzes/personality-type-test.html): Find your dominant personality type and your affinity for every type with an original color-style profiler.
- [Zodiac Compatibility](https://niftyutilities.com/quizzes/zodiac-compatibility.html): See how any two star signs work together, with an in-depth strengths breakdown and a few things to watch.
